data.title: Pearson reports strong 2025 financial performance; 4% sales growth; confident for 2026 and beyond.
data.description: Solid execution led to meeting the financial targets for 2025, with all divisions contributing to the growth. The company's strategic advancements have bolstered confidence for performance in 2026 and beyond. In London on January 14, 2026, the company reported a 4% increase in underlying Group sales. This positive trend sets a strong foundation for future success.

data.title: LIB industry in China reports success with EU-compliant low-GWP test chambers in Europe after 1 year of regulation.
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on January 14, 2026, one year post the implementation of the European Union's Global Warming Potential (GWP) regulation, the LIB industry witnesses validation of its initial low-GWP engineering approach. This strategy is proving successful with consistent operation in European labs. The regulation has significantly influenced the industry, leading to enhanced environmental preservation efforts.

data.title: Bang & Olufsen's H1 2025/26 interim report: Q2 marks 100-year anniversary, with 1.2% revenue decline, 5.4% growth in branded channels, 57.9% gross margin, 7% increase in like-for-like sell-out.
data.description: In Q2 of 2025, Bang & Olufsen commemorated their 100-year milestone with global festivities and promotional activities. Despite a 1.2% decrease in group revenue in local currencies, the company's branded channels saw a notable 5.4% growth in the same currency. The gross margin for this period reached 57.9%, showing a significant rise from the previous year's 53.7%, primarily driven by exceptionally high margins from product sales. Additionally, the like-for-like sell-out surged by 7%, with a substantial 19% growth in sell-out from the Win Cities segment.

data.title: Kikin Financial secures $20M debt facility to boost UK business growth through AI-powered lending platform.
data.description: In London, Kikin Financial, a UK-based fintech lending platform catering to SMEs, has revealed securing initial funding via Percent's platform. The arrangement enables Kikin to access a substantial amount of up to $20 million as the company expands its operations. The funds are earmarked to deliver adaptable credit solutions to prominent consumer businesses in the UK. Kikin's distinctive lending platform leverages AI technology to aid small and medium-sized enterprises in accelerating their growth by granting access to capital under equitable and clear conditions.

data.title: JPCA to host APIC on May 28-29, 2026 in Fukuoka, Japan with 1,500+ industry professionals from 40+ countries attending.
data.description: In Fukuoka, Japan, the Japan Petrochemical Industry Association (JPCA) is set to host the Asia Petrochemical Industry Conference (APIC) on May 28 and May 29, 2026. APIC stands as the premier international conference for the chemical sector in Asia, offering a valuable networking opportunity for industry experts and senior executives. The event expects to draw more than 1,500 participants hailing from the petrochemical and related industries across 40 countries globally, making it a significant platform for business collaboration and knowledge exchange.

data.title: Impersonation scams surge by 1,400% in 2025, warns crypto experts. Stay cautious of unsolicited messages.
data.description: Experts in cryptocurrency security recommend being cautious of any unexpected messages or interactions to prevent falling for scams. It is important to approach every unsolicited communication with skepticism to avoid becoming a victim of fraudulent activities. By staying vigilant and questioning the legitimacy of unfamiliar messages, individuals can better protect themselves from potential scams in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: SEALSQ in talks to invest in and acquire Quantum Computing Firm Quobly, a pioneer in developing silicon-based quantum processors.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland on January 14, 2026, a company named Quobly is leading the way in quantum microelectronics. They are known for developing silicon-based quantum processors through established semiconductor manufacturing procedures.

data.description: Revolut customers are actively using stablecoins for everyday medium-sized payments, with the most common transfer amounts falling between $100 and $500.
